content.json:
# 💻 Endpoint Compromise & Lateral Movement
---
Traces the full attack chain on endpoints — from initial alert through process execution, network connections, file activity, and lateral movement to other devices. Correlates MDE telemetry across five tables to build a complete picture of what happened after a device was compromised.

content.query:
AlertInfo
| summarize
    TotalAlerts = count(),
    HighAlerts = countif(Severity == 'High'),
    MedAlerts = countif(Severity == 'Medium'),
    UniqueDevices = dcount(AlertId)
| project TotalAlerts, HighAlerts, MedAlerts, UniqueDevices
content.title: Alert overview

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
| summarize AlertCount = count(), HighCount = countif(AlertSeverity == 'High') by DeviceName = CompromisedEntity
| sort by AlertCount desc
| take 15
content.title: Most alerted devices

content.query:
AlertInfo
| summarize AlertCount = count() by Category
| sort by AlertCount desc
content.title: Alerts by MITRE category

content.query:
AlertInfo
| where Severity in ('High', 'Medium')
| project TimeGenerated, Title, Severity, Category, ServiceSource, DetectionSource, AttackTechniques
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30
content.title: Recent high & medium severity alerts

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ (
    'powershell.exe', 'cmd.exe', 'wscript.exe', 'cscript.exe',
    'mshta.exe', 'certutil.exe', 'regsvr32.exe', 'rundll32.exe',
    'msiexec.exe', 'wmic.exe', 'bitsadmin.exe', 'schtasks.exe',
    'at.exe', 'net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'nltest.exe', 'whoami.exe',
    'mimikatz.exe', 'psexec.exe', 'psexec64.exe'
)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: LOLBin & suspicious process executions

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('powershell.exe', 'cmd.exe', 'wscript.exe', 'cscript.exe', 'mshta.exe')
| where FileName !in~ ('conhost.exe', 'cmd.exe', 'powershell.exe')
| summarize ChildProcessCount = count() by InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, DeviceName
| sort by ChildProcessCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Suspicious child process spawning

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('download', 'webclient', 'invoke-expression', 'iex', 'http://', 'https://', '-enc', '-encodedcommand', 'bypass', 'hidden', '-nop', '-noprofile')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Encoded & download commands

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| summarize ConnectionCount = count(), DeviceCount = dcount(DeviceId) by RemoteIP, RemotePort, InitiatingProcessFileName
| where ConnectionCount > 5
| sort by ConnectionCount desc
| take 20
content.title: High-frequency outbound connections to public IPs

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemotePort in (4444, 4445, 1337, 8080, 8443, 9001, 9002, 31337)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Connections to common C2 ports

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemotePort == 445
| summarize SMBTargetCount = dcount(RemoteIP) by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| where SMBTargetCount > 3
| sort by SMBTargetCount desc
content.title: SMB scanning — devices touching many internal targets on port 445

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where isnotempty(RemoteUrl)
| where RemoteUrl has_any ('.onion', 'pastebin.com', 'paste.ee', 'ngrok.io', 'serveo.net', 'portmap.io')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Connections to suspicious domains

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where FolderPath has_any (
    'lsass', 'SAM', 'SYSTEM', 'SECURITY',
    'ntds.dit', 'credentials', 'keepass',
    'unattend.xml', 'sysprep', 'Groups.xml'
)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, ActionType, FileName, FolderPath, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessAccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Access to credential stores & sensitive files

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where isnotempty(FileOriginUrl)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FileOriginUrl, FolderPath, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessAccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Files downloaded from the internet

content.query:
DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType in ('Network', 'RemoteInteractive')
| where isnotempty(AccountName)
| summarize
    HopCount = dcount(DeviceName),
    TargetDevices = make_set(DeviceName, 10)
    by AccountName, AccountDomain
| where HopCount > 1
| sort by HopCount desc
content.title: Accounts logging into multiple devices — lateral movement candidates

content.query:
DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType == 'RemoteInteractive'
| project TimeGenerated, AccountName, AccountDomain, DeviceName, RemoteDeviceName, RemoteIP, IsLocalAdmin
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: RDP logons — remote interactive sessions

content.query:
let AlertDevices = SecurityAlert
| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
| summarize by DeviceName = CompromisedEntity;
DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType in ('Network', 'RemoteInteractive')
| join kind=inner AlertDevices on DeviceName
| summarize LogonCount = count() by AccountName, AccountDomain, DeviceName
| sort by LogonCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Logons on alerted devices — who accessed compromised machines
